menu_options.clean: Clean an ever-increasing statistic (delete decreasing values)
menu_options.edit: Browse / edit an entity's statistic values

transfer.title: Import statistics
transfer.description: Transfers long-term and short-term statistics from one entity to another. By default statistics are moved (removed from the source entity); uncheck to copy instead. If the target already has statistics, choose whether to merge (the target's existing rows win on timestamp collisions) or replace them entirely.

data.on_conflict: If the target already has statistics

clean.title: Clean statistics
clean.description: For a total/total_increasing statistic, the cumulative sum must never decrease. This utility scans long-term and short-term statistics in chronological order and deletes every row whose sum falls below the maximum reached before it (sensor glitches, bad imports). The state column is left untouched — a meter reset is legitimate there. Back up your database first.

edit.title: Browse statistic values
edit.description: Lists an entity's statistic rows so you can fix or delete individual values. Choose the table (long-term = hourly, short-term = every 5 minutes) and optionally narrow the period. Back up your database first.

edit_rows.title: Statistic values
edit_rows.description: {shown} row(s) shown out of {total} for {entity} (most recent first — narrow the period if a row is missing). Select one row to edit it, several rows to delete them, or submit with no selection to finish.

edit_value.title: Edit a row
edit_value.description: Row of {when} for {entity}. Adjust the values, or tick Delete to remove the row. Values are written as-is: neighbouring rows and cumulative sums are not recalculated.

edit_delete.title: Delete rows
edit_delete.description: You are about to delete {count} statistic row(s) of {entity}. This cannot be undone.

error.same_entity: Source and target must be different entities.
error.no_statistics: No statistics found for this entity.
error.not_sum: This entity's statistics have no cumulative sum (not a total/total_increasing sensor); there is nothing to clean.
error.no_rows: No statistic rows found in the selected period.
error.invalid_period: The start of the period must be before its end.
error.row_not_found: This row no longer exists — the list has been refreshed.
error.migration_failed: Operation failed — check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.moved: Statistics moved from {source} to {target}: {long_term} long-term rows, {short_term} short-term rows. Restart Home Assistant to refresh the recorder caches.
abort.copied: Statistics copied from {source} to {target}: {long_term} long-term rows, {short_term} short-term rows. Restart Home Assistant to refresh the recorder caches.
abort.moved_replaced: Statistics moved from {source} to {target}: {long_term} long-term rows, {short_term} short-term rows. {replaced} existing rows on the target were deleted first. Restart Home Assistant to refresh the recorder caches.
abort.copied_replaced: Statistics copied from {source} to {target}: {long_term} long-term rows, {short_term} short-term rows. {replaced} existing rows on the target were deleted first. Restart Home Assistant to refresh the recorder caches.
abort.cleaned: Statistics cleaned for {entity}: {long_term_deleted} of {long_term_scanned} long-term rows and {short_term_deleted} of {short_term_scanned} short-term rows deleted. Restart Home Assistant to refresh the recorder caches.
abort.edit_done: Editing finished for {entity}: {modified} row(s) modified, {deleted} row(s) deleted. Charts pick up the changes on their next refresh.

options.merge: Merge (keep the target's rows on collisions)
